name: pf2e-devil-fruit-artifacts
description: FoundryVTT module — PF2E Devil Fruit Archetype Artifacts & Seastone

scripts.build:packs: fvtt package pack --type Module -n devil-fruit-artifacts --inputDirectory src/packs/devil-fruit-artifacts --outputDirectory packs && fvtt package pack --type Module -n seastone-items --inputDirectory src/packs/seastone-items --outputDirectory packs && fvtt package pack --type Module -n sea-bound-effects --inputDirectory src/packs/sea-bound-effects --outputDirectory packs && fvtt package pack --type Module -n macros --inputDirectory src/packs/macros --outputDirectory packs && node scripts/flatten-feats.mjs stage && fvtt package pack --type Module -n devil-fruit-feats --inputDirectory .tmp-devil-fruit-feats --outputDirectory packs && node scripts/flatten-feats.mjs clean && fvtt package pack --type Module -n devil-fruit-effects --inputDirectory src/packs/devil-fruit-effects --outputDirectory packs && fvtt package pack --type Module -n navigation-items --inputDirectory src/packs/navigation-items --outputDirectory packs && fvtt package pack --type Module -n haki-feats --inputDirectory src/packs/haki-feats --outputDirectory packs && fvtt package pack --type Module -n den-den-mushi --inputDirectory src/packs/den-den-mushi --outputDirectory packs
scripts.unpack: fvtt package unpack --type Module -n devil-fruit-artifacts --inputDirectory packs/devil-fruit-artifacts --outputDirectory src/packs/devil-fruit-artifacts && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n seastone-items --inputDirectory packs/seastone-items --outputDirectory src/packs/seastone-items && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n sea-bound-effects --inputDirectory packs/sea-bound-effects --outputDirectory src/packs/sea-bound-effects && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n macros --inputDirectory packs/macros --outputDirectory src/packs/macros && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n devil-fruit-feats --inputDirectory packs/devil-fruit-feats --outputDirectory src/packs/devil-fruit-feats && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n devil-fruit-effects --inputDirectory packs/devil-fruit-effects --outputDirectory src/packs/devil-fruit-effects && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n navigation-items --inputDirectory packs/navigation-items --outputDirectory src/packs/navigation-items && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n haki-feats --inputDirectory packs/haki-feats --outputDirectory src/packs/haki-feats && fvtt package unpack --type Module -n den-den-mushi --inputDirectory packs/den-den-mushi --outputDirectory src/packs/den-den-mushi
scripts.clean: rimraf packs/devil-fruit-artifacts packs/seastone-items packs/sea-bound-effects packs/macros packs/devil-fruit-feats packs/devil-fruit-effects packs/navigation-items packs/haki-feats packs/den-den-mushi
